scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run test:e2e:prepare:smoke && cross-env ASR_E2E_PROFILE=smoke npx playwright test tests/e2e/upload-to-result.spec.js
scripts.test:e2e:remote-standard: npm run test:e2e:prepare:remote-standard && cross-env ASR_E2E_PROFILE=remote-standard npx playwright test tests/e2e/upload-to-result.spec.js
scripts.test:e2e:standard: npm run test:e2e:prepare:standard && cross-env ASR_E2E_PROFILE=standard npx playwright test tests/e2e/upload-to-result.spec.js
scripts.test:e2e:full: npm run test:e2e:prepare:full && cross-env ASR_E2E_PROFILE=full npx playwright test tests/e2e/upload-to-result.spec.js
